attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ACCOUNTING_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ACCOUNTING_EVENT_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ACCRUAL_POSTED_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ACCTS_PAY_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ADJUSTMENT_REASON,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.AMOUNT,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ASSETS_ADDITION_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ASSETS_TRACKING_FLAG,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3,chr(10),''),chr(13),''),chr(234),'')ATTRIBUTE3,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5,chr(10),''),chr(13),''),chr(234),'')ATTRIBUTE5,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE6,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE7,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8,chr(10),''),chr(13),''),chr(234),'')ATTRIBUTE8,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.BATCH_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.CANCELLATION_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.CASH_POSTED_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.CREATED_BY,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.CREATION_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.DAILY_AMOUNT,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.DESCRIPTION,chr(10),''),chr(13),''),chr(234),'')DESCRIPTION,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.DIST_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.DIST_MATCH_TYPE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.END_EXPENSE_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.EXCHANGE_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE_VARIANCE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.INCOME_TAX_REGION,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.INVENTORY_TRANSFER_STATUS,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.INVOICE_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.INVOICE_INCLUDES_PREPAY_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.INVOICE_PRICE_VARIANCE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.JEBE_VAT_ALLOC_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.ORG_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.PARENT_INVOICE_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.PARENT_REVERSAL_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.PERIOD_NAME,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.POSTED_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.PREPAY_AMOUNT_REMAINING,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.PREPAY_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.PRICE_VAR_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.QUANTITY_INVOICED,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.QUANTITY_VARIANCE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.RATE_VAR_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.REVERSAL_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.START_EXPENSE_DATE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.TAX_CALCULATED_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.TAX_CODE_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.TAX_RECOVERABLE_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.UNIT_PRICE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.VAT_CODE,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.WEB_PARAMETER_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.INVOICE_LINE_NUMBER,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.OLD_DIST_LINE_NUMBER,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.OLD_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.MATCHED_UOM_LOOKUP_CODE
FROM
MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL
where MF_AP_INVOICE_DISTRI_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYYHH24:MI:SS')
and invoice_distribution_id not in ('351390867','351390865')
